Trusted Pool Table Company

CK Pool Tables Services is led by CEO Charles Kibe. We sell durable and affordable pool tables and provide professional repair, maintenance, cloth replacement, cushion replacement, leveling, relocation, installation, accessories, custom pool table designs, home and club setup, inspection, and after-sales support.

Choose from quality pool tables for homes, clubs, lounges, hotels, and entertainment spaces.

Stylish, durable tables for home game rooms and family spaces.

Strong commercial tables for clubs, hotels, bars, and lounges.

Restored quality tables for customers who want value and durability.
